findings.detail: Imports HypothesisResult from pipeline/investigation_loop (glue layer) rather than pipeline/investigation_types (data module) where the dataclass is defined. causal_decomposition and flow_decomposition import from investigation_types. This is inconsistent but allowed per team lead instructions ('except data types from investigation_loop which is the shared data module'). Consider standardizing on investigation_types for consistency.

notes: Imports: config/investigation_config (config), gateway/async_client (gateway), gateway/token_budget (gateway), pipeline/investigation_loop (data type re-export). No sibling back-imports. Single public entry point: forecast_scenarios(hypothesis, include_tail_risk, budget) -> ScenarioTree | None.
